abilities.description: When you @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.a2d7793b23c17489]{Secure an Advantage} by sending your spider to scout a place, add +1 and take +1 momentum on a hit.

You may @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.e6ed148eff82c171]{Face Danger} +shadow by sending your spider to secretly study someone. On a hit, the spider returns to reveal the target’s deepest fears through a reflection in its glassy eyes. Use this to @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.13b2d777c6fb719d]{Gather Information} and reroll any dice.
When your spider sets a trap, add +1 as you @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.2f2ba4090b22a122]{Enter the Fray} +shadow. On a strong hit, also inflict 2 progress.
